bars.name: George Street Pub
bars.notes: Home of Ravens Club of Chicago. Game sound, food, and drinks for all gamedays.

bars.notes: Home of Bills Backers Delilah's Chicago.

bars.name: The Butcher's Tap
bars.notes: Excellent venue for Bills fans to gather.

bars.name: Lottie's Pub
bars.notes: Historic sports bar established in 1932 with pizza, pub grub, 20+ taps, vintage vibe. NFL Sunday Ticket.

bars.name: The Corner Bar
bars.notes: Friendly spot for Bears fans on game days.

bars.name: Every bar in Chicago with a TV
bars.notes: Bears games shown at virtually every bar in the city.

bars.notes: Game sound, DJ playing videos during commercials, giveaways, Skyline Chili specials.

bars.notes: Welcoming environment for Bengals fans.

bars.notes: Home to Chicagoland Browns Backers on gamedays.

bars.notes: Chi-Town Dawg Pound hosts massive Browns watch parties with giveaways and big game-day energy.

bars.name: John Barleycorn
bars.notes: Browns Backers club watches every Sunday, usually 150+ Browns fans.

bars.name: The Warehouse Bar & Pizzeria
bars.notes: Home of Dallas Cowboys Fans Chicago (established 2007). Welcoming atmosphere.

bars.name: Commonwealth Tavern
bars.address: North Center neighborhood near Roscoe Village
bars.notes: Purported Dallas Cowboys bar of Chicago. Also hosts Cubs and Marquette watch parties.

bars.notes: Broncos game watch location.

bars.name: Tin Lizzie
bars.notes: Lincoln Park sports pub with flat-screens, comfort food, garage-door storefront. Can get rowdy on game days.

bars.notes: Wide range of bar food, daily specials, sports-bar setting with live music.

bars.name: Avenue Tavern
bars.notes: Detroit Lions bar.

bars.notes: Home of Chicago Packers Backers. Most storied Packers bar outside Wisconsin. Hosts annual "Packerpalooza" event with player appearances.

bars.notes: Colts game watch location.

bars.notes: Colts game watch location.

bars.notes: Lincoln Park favorite with two rooms, multiple HDTVs, World Famous Wings. Hosted 2024 Super Bowl special events.

bars.notes: Upscale sports bar, eclectic menu, slick loungey space with plentiful plasma TVs. Home of Chicago Patriots Nation fan group.

bars.notes: Jets game watch location.

bars.notes: Eagles game watch location.

bars.notes: 49ers game watch location.

bars.notes: 49ers game watch location.

bars.notes: Seahawks game watch location.

bars.notes: Seahawks game watch location.

bars.notes: Commanders (formerly Redskins) game watch location.

bars.name: Theory
bars.notes: Also a Celtics/Patriots bar. Upscale sports bar with plentiful plasma TVs.

bars.notes: Neighborhood bar, draws homesick Bostonians.

bars.name: Wrigleyville bars (general area)
bars.address: Clark St / Addison area around Wrigley Field
bars.notes: Hundreds of bars surround Wrigley Field. Nearly every bar in Wrigleyville shows Cubs games. Too many to list individually.

bars.name: Sports Corner Wrigleyville
bars.notes: Multi-level sports bar in heart of Wrigleyville.

bars.name: Cubby Bear
bars.notes: Iconic Cubs bar directly across from stadium.

bars.name: Murphy's Bleachers
bars.notes: Classic Cubs bar, bleacher crowd hangout.

bars.name: The Gingerman Tavern
bars.notes: Neighborhood Cubs bar with craft beer selection.

bars.name: Turtles Bar & Grill
bars.notes: Awesome neighbor's patio vibe, close to stadium.

bars.name: Reggie's Rock Club
bars.notes: Bar with live music, shuttle service to/from games.

bars.name: Nine Bar
bars.notes: Pre/post-game spot for White Sox fans.

bars.name: Toons Bar & Grill
bars.notes: Kansas City bar (also shows Chiefs games). BBQ-focused menu appropriate for KC teams.

bars.name: The Barn Hockey Bar
bars.notes: Premier hockey bar near the arena. Always has hockey on. Recommended for any NHL game viewing.

bars.name: Durkin's
bars.notes: Steelers bar that shows Penguins games during playoffs. Regular season uncertain.

bars.name: Sedgwick's
bars.notes: Blues bar in Chicago. Also shows Chiefs, Colts, Cardinals (MLB).

bars.name: Tripoli Tavern
bars.notes: Boston sports bar (Celtics, Red Sox, Bruins, Patriots). Good for all Boston teams.

bars.name: Theory
bars.notes: Also shows Celtics games. Upscale sports bar.

bars.name: Bulls Bar Network (Official)
bars.notes: Official Bulls Bar Network presented by Corona. See full list at NBA.com/bulls/barnetwork. Bars show every Bulls game.

bars.name: United Center corner bars
bars.notes: Standing-room ticket gives access to four corner bars at 300-level. Good for watching other games too.

bars.name: John Barleycorn Wrigleyville
bars.notes: Cleveland sports bar (Browns, Cavaliers, Guardians/Indians). Open Fri-Sat evenings only.

bars.name: The Tin Lizzie
bars.notes: Detroit sports bar (Lions, Pistons, Red Wings, Tigers). Lincoln Park location.

bars.name: Will's Northwoods Inn
bars.notes: Wisconsin sports bar (Packers, Bucks, Brewers, Badgers). Close to Chicago, natural rivalry.
